title: Defends the Gate
summary: Everyone wants you on their side when it comes to a fight because nothing gets by you.
tiers: Tier 3: Fortification Builder or Divert Attacks
Tier 6: Generate Force Field or Stun Attack
gm_intrusions: A strategically important structure collapses. The enemy attacks from an unexpected direction.
